mapper.select:
SELECT ips.id ,ips.security_code ,ips.security_short_name ,ips.adjuster_name ,ips.entry_time ,CASE WHEN pp.pool_name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(pp.pool_name, '/', p.pool_name) ELSE p.pool_name END AS target_pool_name ,ips.security_type ,bi.b_info_issuer AS issuer ,bi.b_info_maturitydate AS maturityDate ,bi.b_info_delistdate AS delistDate ,bi.b_info_repurchasedate AS repurchaseDate FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN ip_investment_pool p ON p.id = ips.target_pool_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.pool_type = 'forbidden' LEFT JOIN ip_investment_pool pp ON p.parent_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN sirm_securityinfo bi ON bi.s_info_code = ips.security_code
ips.is_deleted = 0
AND ips.security_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{securityCode}, '%')
AND ips.security_type = #{securityType}
AND (bi.b_info_maturitydate IS NULL OR bi.b_info_maturitydate >= CURDATE())
AND bi.b_info_maturitydate IS NOT NULL AND bi.b_info_maturitydate < CURDATE()
AND ips.submit_time >= #{adjustTimeStart}
AND ips.submit_time <= CONCAT(#{adjustTimeEnd}, ' 23:59:59')
AND ips.adjuster_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{adjusterName}, '%')
AND bi.b_info_issuer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{issuer}, '%')
AND ips.audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY ips.entry_time DESC ,ips.id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT security_type FROM ip_pool_status WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND security_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY security_type ASC
